steps.title: Subtract t from both sides
steps.content: Starting with $6r = 7s + t$, subtract $t$ from both sides to isolate the term with $s$: $$6r - t = 7s$$

steps.title: Divide both sides by 7
steps.content: Divide both sides by 7 to solve for $s$: $$s = \frac{6r - t}{7}$$ This matches choice D — D is correct.
